item.dc:creator: Brennan Leach
Melanie Zanona
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s political career is at stake on Saturday as Louisiana voters weigh in on the Republican for the first time since he voted to convict President Donald Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial

media:content.media:credit: Getty Images; Bloomberg via Getty Images; AP
media:content.media:text: Rep. Julia Letlow, Sen. Bill Cassidy, and Louisiana state Treasurer John Fleming.
media:content.media:description: Rep. Julia Letlow, Sen. Bill Cassidy, and Louisiana state Treasurer John Fleming.

item.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a primary for the first time since his Trump impeachment vote

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The decision leaves in place a Virginia Supreme Court ruling that concluded the process leading up to a referendum approving a new congressional map was flawed.

media:content.media:text: Voters In Virginia Head To The Polls For Redistricting Referendum
media:content.media:description: Voters arrive at a polling location on April 21, 2026 in Arlington, Va.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Virginia Democrats’ attempt to revive new congressional map

item.dc:creator: Matt Dixon
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ attempt to do away with anti-gerrymandering provisions in the state constitution had its first day in court Friday, as opposing attorneys pushed a Tallahassee judge to put a temporary hold on new congressional lines that created four additional GOP-leaning seats.

media:content.media:text: Oliver Larkin, Democratic candidate for Congress in Florida’s 23rd district, speaks during an emergency town hall that he held to address Florida Republicans’ newly approved congressional redistricting map (seen on wall).
media:content.media:description: Oliver Larkin, Democratic candidate for Congress in Florida’s 23rd District, speaks during an emergency town hall that he held to address Florida Republicans’ newly approved congressional redistricting map on May 4 in Coral Springs.

item.title: Court fight over Ron DeSantis’ new congressional map kicks off in Florida

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: As the crisis in the Strait of Hormuz drags on, guardians of another critical waterway are worried about the precedent it sets for any future clash between the United States and China.

media:content.media:text: Oil tank farm and ships off the coast of Singapore
media:content.media:description: Ships and oil tankers in the Strait of Malacca, off the coast of Singapore.

media:content.media:text: Oil tank farm and ships off the coast of Singapore
media:content.media:description: Ships and oil tankers in the Strait of Malacca, off the coast of Singapore.

media:content.media:text: Strategic maritime chokepoints in global oil trade
media:content.media:description: Ships and oil tankers in the Strait of Malacca, off the coast of Singapore.

item.title: As Hormuz crisis rattles the world, eyes are on another key waterway

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Learn more about the 2026 Preakness, including when to tune in, where to watch, streaming information and what to expect from today’s race.

media:content.media:text: A tight group of racehorses and jockeys race toward the camera on a dirt track.
media:content.media:description: The field heads into the first turn during the 150th Preakness Stakes at Pimlico Race Course in Baltimore, Md. on May 17, 2025.

item.title: 2026 Preakness Stakes guide: Location, time, TV channels, betting favorites

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Joe Murphy
item.description: A moment of self-awareness in the Senate, a double murder conviction gets overturned, and a trailblazing basketball player dies.
item.title: Kash Patel’s visit to Capitol Hill gets heated, and a walk in the Beatles’ footsteps: The news quiz

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
item.description: The Trump administration’s moves to make flavored vapes more widely available have caused a splintering among some in the MAHA movement and some federal health officials.

media:content.media:text: FDA Commissioner Martin Makary speaks alongside President Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary speaks alongside President Donald Trump during a press conference at the White House in 2025.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Signs Executive Order Reclassifying Marijuana As Low Risk Drug
media:content.media:description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary speaks alongside President Donald Trump during a press conference at the White House in 2025.

item.title: Trump’s flavored vape push sparks backlash from MAHA influencers and federal officials

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Police patrolled the streets of London as tens of thousands of protesters descended on the U.K. capital on Saturday for two rival demonstrations, and tens of thousands more soccer fans congregated for the final of England’s major domestic cup competition at Wembley Stadium

media:content.media:text: 'Unite the Kingdom' march in London.
media:content.media:description: Police take security measures as large crowds march in London on May 16.

media:content.media:text: 'Unite the Kingdom' march in London.
media:content.media:description: Police take security measures as large crowds march in London on May 16.

item.title: London police out in force to deal with rival rallies and a soccer final

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: A mother was arrested Friday after her two children were found dead in a car that was lit on fire in San Antonio

media:content.media:text: A Texas mother has been charged with capital murder after two children, ages 5 and 7, were found dead inside a burned vehicle Friday in San Antonio.
media:content.media:description: A Texas mother has been charged with capital murder after two children, ages 5 and 7, were found dead inside a burned vehicle in San Antonio on Friday.

item.title: Texas mom charged with capital murder after kids found dead in burnt car

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Federal investigators are examining whether strong winds or other factors may have contributed to a small plane crash that killed two people after the aircraft struck a home and exploded in Akron, Ohio, during a training flight, officials said Friday

media:content.media:text: Plane Crash in Akron, Ohio.
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises after a plane crashed into a house in Akron, Ohio, on Thursday.

item.title: Federal investigators search for cause of fatal Akron plane crash into home

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Deciding when to get routine mammograms is confusing.

media:content.media:text: A doctor looks at mammogram imagery.
media:content.media:description: A doctor looks at mammogram imagery, regular mammogram on the left, and contrast enhanced mammogram on the right, in 2024, in Houston.

item.title: When should you get a mammogram? Conflicting advice makes it hard to know

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal

item.dc:creator: Brennan Leach
Melanie Zanona
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s political career is at stake on Saturday as Louisiana voters weigh in on the Republican for the first time since he voted to convict President Donald Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial

media:content.media:credit: Getty Images; Bloomberg via Getty Images; AP
media:content.media:text: Rep. Julia Letlow, Sen. Bill Cassidy, and Louisiana state Treasurer John Fleming.
media:content.media:description: Rep. Julia Letlow, Sen. Bill Cassidy, and Louisiana state Treasurer John Fleming.

item.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a primary for the first time since his Trump impeachment vote

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: President Donald Trump said late Friday that a top Islamic State group commander has been killed in Africa in a joint operation with Nigeria’s armed forces

media:content.media:text: President Trump Departs White House For Florida
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump touted the “meticulously planned and very complex” joint U.S.-Nigerian mission to kill Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

item.title: Trump says ISIS second-in-command killed in Africa

item.dc:creator: Casey Wooten
item.description: The president also said he’s not considering the political implications of the Iran war on the midterms, when Republicans will be defending slim majorities in each chamber.

media:content.media:text: U.S. President Donald Trump Departs White House For China
media:content.media:description: Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he wasn’t thinking about Americans’ finances “even a little bit” as he negotiates with Iran to end the war.

item.title: ‘Perfect statement’: Trump defends his dismissal of Americans’ finances amid Iran war

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: Human remains found at a Texas property this week have been confirmed to be those of a missing boy last seen in 2022, the Tarrant County district attorney said Friday

media:content.media:text: Everman police Chief Al Brooks
media:content.media:description: Everman police Chief Al Brooks, left, exits the former family home of Noel Rodriguez-Alvarez in Everman, Texas on May 12, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A dozen FBI evidence response team workers in matching blue t-shirts with yellow letters stand in the front yard of a home.
media:content.media:description: An FBI evidence response team outside the home in Everman, Texas, on Tuesday.

item.title: Human remains found on Texas property are those of missing 6-year-old boy

item.dc:creator: Jo Yurcaba
item.description: Texas Children’s Hospital must create the country’s “first-ever detransition clinic,” Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said in announcing a settlement over transgender healthcare.

media:content.media:text: Texas Children's Hospital in Houston.
media:content.media:description: Texas Children's Hospital in Houston called the settlement a "difficult decision."

item.title: Texas Children’s will create ‘detransition clinic’ to settle DOJ and state investigation

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
item.description: South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson said Friday that his office may pursue the death penalty when it retries Alex Murdaugh in the 2021 murder of his son and wife.“In light of the Supreme Court’s decision, we’re back to square one on this case, and that means all our legal options are on the table, including the death penalty,” Wilson said

media:content.media:text: Alex Murdaugh sits with his head down during a hearing.
media:content.media:description: Alex Murdaugh during a hearing on a motion for a retrial at the Richland County Judicial Center in Columbia, S.C., on Jan. 16, 2024.

media:content.media:text: Former Colleton County Clerk of Court Mary Rebecca "Becky" Hill in St. Matthews, S.C., last year.
media:content.media:description: Former Colleton County Clerk of Court Mary Rebecca "Becky" Hill in St. Matthews, S.C., last year.

item.title: Prosecutors may pursue death penalty in Alex Murdaugh retrial, South Carolina AG says

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Alleviate the common effects of bunions from the comfort of your home. Learn about all of your options, including bunion correctors and toe spacers, from experts.

media:content.media:text: Bunions can impact daily activities, but experts say that with at-home treatments, symptoms, including pain and inflammation, can decrease.
media:content.media:description: Bunions can impact daily activities, but experts say that with at-home treatments, symptoms, including pain and inflammation, can decrease.

item.title: How to treat your bunions at home, according to podiatrists

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Try anti-snoring devices like Snore Rx mouthguards, Breathe Right nasal strips and mouth tape.

media:content.media:text: Some anti-snoring devices aim to expand the nasal pathway or upper airway, while others help make you comfortable in the optimal sleeping positions for snoring reduction.
media:content.media:description: Some anti-snoring devices aim to expand the nasal pathway or upper airway, while others help make you comfortable in the optimal sleeping positions for snoring reduction.

item.title: Do anti-snoring devices actually work?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: If you need to stock your beauty drawer, now is the time.
item.title: 39+ skin care deals we’re shopping from Dermstore’s summer sale — starting under $12

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I found the best way to get rid of mosquitoes after talking with pest control experts. They recommend the best products and methods for making your home mosquito-free.

media:content.media:text: Experts recommend using products like mosquito dunks and plug-in traps to get rid of mosquitoes.
media:content.media:description: Experts recommend using products like mosquito dunks and plug-in traps to get rid of mosquitoes.

media:content.media:text: Experts recommend using products like mosquito dunks and plug-in traps to get rid of mosquitoes.
media:content.media:description: Experts recommend using products like mosquito dunks and plug-in traps to get rid of mosquitoes.

item.title: How to get rid of mosquitoes at home and keep them out
